macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Exceed $142 Million in 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw over $142 million in futures liquidations, with Ethereum at $69.16 million (mostly shorts) and Bitcoin at $67.77 million (mostly longs), alongside Solana's $5.28 million hit primarily by longs amid a sharp market shakeout.

items.title: Crypto Perpetual Futures Record $142.2 Million Liquidations
items.summary: Estimated liquidations in crypto perpetual futures reached $142.2 million over the past 24 hours, highlighting ongoing market volatility according to NS3 data.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Near $76K After Rebound from Dip
items.summary: Bitcoin remains firm near $76,000, rebounding from a dip with strong buying interest, marking its strongest level since February amid easing Middle East tensions; it recently hit a two-month high near $78,000.

items.title: Crypto Market Capitalization Stable at $2.57 Trillion
items.summary: The total crypto market cap hovered around $2.57 trillion over the past 24 hours with minimal change, as assets moved in various directions following a growth phase.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: DeepSeek V4 Released, Competes with Top Language Models
items.summary: DeepSeek V4 emerges as a next-gen language model challenging leading competitors in performance. Highlighted in weekly AI updates covering major advancements.

items.title: Happy Horse 1.0 Launched as #1 Free AI Video Generator
items.summary: Happy Horse 1.0 is touted as the top free AI video generator gaining widespread attention. Part of a wave of updates in video generation tools.

items.title: GPT Image 2 Unveiled as New Image Generation Leader
items.summary: GPT Image 2 pushes image generation quality to new heights, crowned the new king in the field. Featured in recent AI model breakthroughs.

items.title: GPT-5.5 Update Teased with Potential Major Implications
items.summary: Speculation around GPT-5.5 update suggests significant enhancements for OpenAI's ecosystem. Discussed amid this week's top AI developments.

items.title: Microsoft Releases Advanced World Model and ML Research Agent
items.summary: Microsoft quietly launched a highly useful world model and an AI agent capable of autonomous machine learning research on local machines. Additional multimodal model merges understanding and generation.

items.title: Andrej Karpathy Discusses Agentic Engineering Over Vibe Coding
items.summary: Andrej Karpathy, Eureka Labs founder, explains the shift from vibe coding to agentic engineering, viewing LLMs as 'ghosts' requiring new judgment. Delivered at AI Ascent 2026.

items.title: Open CoDesign and Claude Design Open Sourced for Creators
items.summary: Open CoDesign and Claude Design go open source, drawing interest from creators in design tools. Part of ongoing AI tool advancements.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nvidia Announces New GPU with Increased VRAM
items.summary: Nvidia has announced a new GPU featuring more VRAM, potentially impacting gaming performance upgrades. This comes alongside discussions on selling old hardware to fund upgrades.

items.title: Valve Confirms Steam Deck 2 in Development
items.summary: Valve has officially confirmed that the Steam Deck 2 is in development, though no release date, price, or specs have been revealed yet.

items.title: Xbox Project Helix Faces Memory Shortages
items.summary: Xbox confirms that Project Helix pricing and availability are affected by memory shortages, but it is expected to lead performance in console and PC gaming.

items.title: PlayStation Introduces 30-Day Online Login for Digital Games
items.summary: PlayStation now requires an online login every 30 days to play digital games, sparking backlash, alongside price increases in additional regions.

items.title: The Blood of Dawn Walker Release Date Announced
items.summary: The open-world dark fantasy action RPG The Blood of Dawn Walker will launch on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on September 3rd.

items.title: Publishers Add 14-Day Online Check-Ins to Games
items.summary: Publishers like 2K and Nuvo have implemented mandatory 14-day online check-ins for titles including NBA 2K25, NBA 2K26, and Marvel's Midnight Suns.

items.title: GameNative Receives Major Update for Android Windows Emulation
items.summary: GameNative emulator for Android adds Epic EOSDRM support, online play, multicontroller, Steam cloud fixes, HDR, FSR 1.0, and more.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: European Commission Issues Preliminary DSA Findings Against Meta
items.summary: The European Commission accused Meta of failing to prevent under-13 users from accessing Instagram and Facebook, potentially leading to hefty fines under the Digital Services Act.

items.title: Apple Plans New Siri Camera Mode in iOS 27
items.summary: Apple is set to integrate Visual Intelligence into the iPhone camera app as a new Siri mode, embedding advanced features more deeply into iOS 27.

items.title: Cognizant Agrees to Acquire Astreya for $600M
items.summary: Cognizant will buy Astreya, a provider of IT services for data centers, AI labs, and networks, in a deal expected to close in Q2.

items.title: OpenLight Raises $50M in Series A Extension
items.summary: Photonics chip designer OpenLight secured $50M in additional funding after a $34M raise in August 2025, focusing on custom application-specific chips.

items.title: Nvidia Fixes 8GB RAM Issue on RTX 5070 GPU
items.summary: Nvidia addressed the 8GB RAM limitation on one of its GPUs by offering a higher-RAM version at nearly double the price.

items.title: Apple Introduces Cheaper App Store Subscription Options
items.summary: Apple launched commitment-based monthly subscriptions and a cheaper option for App Store subscriptions to provide more flexible billing.

items.title: Motorola Razr Plus (2026) Design Leaks Ahead of Premiere
items.summary: Full design details of Motorola's upcoming Razr Plus (2026) foldable phone have leaked shortly before its official announcement.
